texto: Playing the victim role: Manipulator portrays him- or herself as a victim of circumstance or of someone else's behavior in order to gain pity, sympathy or evoke compassion and thereby get something from another. Caring and conscientious people cannot stand to see anyone suffering and the manipulator often finds it easy to play on sympathy to get cooperation.
explicacao: Citação de George K. Simon Jr. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Playing the victim role: Manipulator portrays him- or herself as a victim of circumstance or of s…” articula autoestima, abuse, abusers em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como abusers e abusive-relationships.
